gaps.snippet: # [doc = " One row of the `std.vsa` guarantee matrix (RFC-0016 §4.5 / vsa.md §4)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " Each row covers one `(model_id, op)` pair.  The guarantee tag is read from the authoritative"] # [doc = " RFC-0003 §4 matrix (`mycelium_vsa::matrix_tag`), not invented here (C2 / VR-5)."] # [derive (Debug , Clone , Copy , PartialEq)] pub struct OpGuarantee { # [doc = " The VSA model id, e.g. `\"MAP-I\"`."] pub model_id : & 'static str , # [doc = " The operation."] pub op : VsaOp , # [doc = " The guarantee tag (the RFC-0003 §4 matrix entry for this pair)."] pub tag : GuaranteeStrength , # [doc = " Is the result EXPLAIN-able (carries an inspectable artifact such as a bound or trace)?"] # [doc = " `Exact` ops are `false` — they carry no bound (M-I1); all approximate ops are `true`."] pub explain_able : bool , }

gaps.snippet: # [doc = " The `std.vsa` guarantee matrix (vsa.md §4), encoded as data (RFC-0016 §4.5)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " Rows = `(model, op)` pairs.  Tag = the RFC-0003 §4 normative entry for that pair (copied from"] # [doc = " `mycelium_vsa::RFC0003_MATRIX`; divergence is caught in tests).  `explain_able` = whether"] # [doc = " the op exposes an inspectable bound/trace artifact (C3)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " Notes matching the spec:"] # [doc = " - `bind` is `Exact` for MAP-I/MAP-B/BSC/HRR/FHRR (algebraic; §4.1 erratum) and `Proven` for"] # [doc = "   SBC (the Bloom analysis — `matrix.rs` `(\"SBC\", Bind, Proven)`)."] # [doc = " - `unbind` is `Exact` for MAP-I/MAP-B/BSC (self-inverse); `Empirical` for HRR/FHRR (the"] # [doc = "   residual weak link; §4.1); `Proven` for SBC."] # [doc = " - `bundle` is `Proven` for MAP-I/MAP-B/BSC/SBC and `Empirical` for HRR/FHRR."] # [doc = " - `permute` is `Exact` for **all** models (§4.1 erratum — a fixed coordinate bijection)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # FLAG Q3 (SBC bind/bundle `Proven`)"] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " The SBC `bind` and `bundle` cells are `Proven` in the kernel matrix (`matrix.rs`), reflecting"] # [doc = " the Bloom / Counting-Bloom analysis cited in RFC-0003 §4/§5.  This table mirrors that cell"] # [doc = " faithfully.  The exact theorem constants and checked side-conditions are owned by RFC-0003 §5"] # [doc = " and the encoded matrix; they are **cited here, not restated** (VR-5 / vsa.md §7-Q3)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # FLAG Q3 (HRR/FHRR `bundle` `Empirical`)"] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " HRR/FHRR `bundle` is `Empirical` (Gaussian/asymptotic).  The sub-Gaussian phasor upgrade to"] # [doc = " `Proven` (Thomas) is **not** pre-claimed here — it requires checked instantiation not yet"] # [doc = " discharged in this crate (VR-5 / vsa.md §7-Q3)."] tag : GuaranteeStrength :: Exact , explain_able : false , } , OpGuarantee { model_id : "BSC" , op : VsaOp :: Bundle , tag : GuaranteeStrength :: Proven , explain_able : true , } , OpGuarantee { model_id : "BSC" , op : VsaOp :: Permute , tag : GuaranteeStrength :: Exact , explain_able : false , } , OpGuarantee { model_id : "HRR" , op : VsaOp :: Bind , tag : GuaranteeStrength :: Exact , Proven , explain_able : true , } , OpGuarantee { model_id : "SBC" , op : VsaOp :: Permute , tag : GuaranteeStrength :: Exact , explain_able : false , } ,] ;

gaps.snippet: # [doc = " Look up a row in [`GUARANTEE_MATRIX`] by model id and op.  Returns `None` for an unregistered"] # [doc = " model — an unregistered model has no honest tag to offer (the same convention as"] # [doc = " `mycelium_vsa::matrix_tag`)."] # [must_use] pub fn std_matrix_tag (model_id : & str , op : VsaOp) -> Option < GuaranteeStrength > { GUARANTEE_MATRIX . iter () . find (| r | r . model_id == model_id && r . op == op) . map (| r | r . tag) }
